_comment: Starting coordinates for the Featured Launch Set marketing stills.
scripts/capture-launch-stills.sh. Each `query` is fed straight to the
in-app deep-link parser (DeepLinkService) through the chrome-free smoke
These are DRAFTS to refine by taste: capture, eyeball the PNG, nudge
zoom/x/y/colorScheme, recapture. zoom=1.0 keeps the module's default
framing; x/y pan in fractal-plane coordinates; juliaX/juliaY set the
Julia constant; colorScheme picks the palette; iterations raises detail
for deeper zooms. Omit a key to keep the module default.

stills.caption: The original — infinite detail at every zoom.
stills.note: Seahorse Valley. Deepen zoom (with iterations) for tighter spirals.

stills.caption: Twist one constant, get a whole new universe.
stills.note: Matches the proven in-app 'Spiral Galaxy' preset (zoom 1.5, psychedelic). zoom=1 + colorScheme=4 rendered fully black.

stills.caption: Jagged, alien, unmistakable.
stills.note: Antenna/armada detail. Drop zoom to ~1.2 (x=-0.5,y=-0.5) for the whole ship.

stills.caption: Fractals with memory — each step remembers the last.
stills.note: zoom=1 left too much empty white center; zoom in to fill the frame with the dendrite.

stills.caption: Relaxation dynamics blooming into petals.
stills.note: Default framing shows the petal bloom; nudge colorScheme for contrast.

stills.caption: Where root-finding turns into art.
stills.note: Three root basins. Slight zoom keeps the tri-fold boundary centered.

stills.caption: Infinite perimeter, finite area.
stills.note: zoom=0.9 clipped the bottom; zoom further out so the whole snowflake fits.

stills.caption: Chaos that grows a leaf.
stills.note: Default framing centers the fern; verify it isn't cropped at the tip.

stills.caption: The butterfly effect, drawn.
stills.note: Earlier default render looked flat — most likely a palette/param issue, not framing. Tune colorScheme here first.
